title: astragalus frigidus var. littoralis
intro: Astragalus frigidus var. littoralis, also known as saltbush milkvetch or littoral milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Astragalus frigidus var. littoralis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus frigidus var. littoralis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
